Internal note: HKEX/SFC considerations for proposed acquisition by Harbor Jade Holdings Limited (the “Company”) of Seaglass Foods Group Limited via Red Banyan Capital Fund I SPV.
This note consolidates only public information previously released on 02 Apr 2025 on HKEX news and excludes “inside information” as defined under Part XIVA SFO (specific corporate information not generally known to likely dealers and price‑material).
No price‑sensitive figures, swap ratios, or draft timetables outside the published announcement are included, and trading advice is not provided.
Listing Rules Ch.14 classification and Takeovers Code compliance will be managed by the Company Secretary; queries should go to compliance@harborjade.com.hk (role mailbox).
For fund structuring, Red Banyan Capital Fund I LP will hold through Harbor Jade Acquisition SPV I Limited; CR No. 9123456 and BR No. 12345678-000-00-0 are illustrative placeholders and not validated.
Employment and integration: Any transfer of business will follow s.73 of the Employment Ordinance; consultation notices will use generic fields only.
HR data minimisation: Do not circulate personal files; the below sample record is for workflow testing — HKID: Z123456(0) (invalid checksum, template only).
The HR intake form should use labels: Name [________], Position [________], Department [________], Contact [________], without collecting date of birth or bank details at this stage.
Public contact points: General enquiries +852 3900 0000 and hr@seaglassfoods.hk are department contacts and not tied to any individual.
Address for service will be confirmed post‑announcement; draft placeholder: Suite 1201, 12/F, East Harbour Centre, 88 Midport Avenue, Kowloon, Hong Kong (fictional).
No MNPI should be transmitted by email; any materials beyond what is on HKEX should be stored in the virtual data room with access logged by the deal counsel.
SFO ss.270/291 risks relating to disclosure of false or misleading information are low given reliance on public notices, but staff must avoid speculative commentary.
Finance workflow: Settlement instructions remain TBC; do not request or share bank account numbers, FPS IDs, or e‑cheques until Operations circulates a standard form.
If in doubt, call the internal Compliance Helpline at +852 3900 0000 or email listing@harborjade.com.hk; escalate market conduct issues to regulatory@redbanyanfund.com.
